channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: US embassy in Riyadh hit by drones
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- U.S. Embassy in Saudi Capital Hit by 2 Drones on Tuesday, Kingdom Says
- Attack by two drones on U.S. Embassy in Saudi capital sparks ‘limited’ fire; Trump suggests U.S. to retaliate 'soon'
- U.S. Embassy in Saudi Capital Hit by 2 Drones on Tuesday, Kingdom Says
- CIA station in Saudi Arabia struck by suspected Iranian drone, source says - Reuters
- CIA station in Saudi Arabia struck by suspected Iranian drone, source says
- CIA station among targets as suspected Iranian drones strike US embassy in Riyadh: Report
- Iran drone hit CIA station in Saudi Arabia: Report
- Iranian drones hits CIA station at US embassy in Riyadh, 'Washington Post' reports
- Drone strike hits US consulate parking lot in Dubai
- Urgent: U.S. embassy in Riyadh warns of attacks over Saudi city of Dhahran
- Roof collapses partially at US Embassy in Riyadh from drone strike — WP
- Saudi Arabia condemns drone strike against US Embassy
- Images show damage at US Embassy in Riyadh after drone strike
- Drones hit US embassy as vengeful Iran targets Mideast cities
- Drones Hit US Embassy As Vengeful Iran Targets Mideast Cities
- US embassy in Riyadh hit by Iranian drones as Israeli troops enter southern Lebanon
- Saudi Arabia: Limited fire at US embassy in Riyadh after drone attack
- Embassy in Riyadh, air base in Bahrain: Full list of US facilities in Middle East targeted in fresh drone attacks today
- US embassy in Riyadh hit by drones, Americans urged to 'depart now' from Middle East
- US Embassy in Saudi Arabia hit with Iranian drones as American and Israeli attacks on Iran escalate
- US Embassy in Saudi Arabia hit with Iranian drones as American and Israeli attacks on Iran escalate
- US embassy in Riyadh hit by drone attack, says Saudi state media; no injuries reported
- US Embassy in Riyadh hit amid US Israel strikes on Iran]]>
